              </div>

                <div data-badge="" data-state-plan="CUSTOM" style={{display: "flex", width: "64.1771px", height: "20px", minWidth: "auto", minHeight: "auto", paddingRight: "8px", paddingLeft: "8px", overflow: "hidden", alignItems: "center", fontWeight: "500", textAlign: "left", backgroundColor: "rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.118)", borderRadius: "9999px", userSelect: "none"}}>

                    Custom
                  </span>
                </div>

                </div>

                      Relationship intelligence
                    </a>
                  </p>
                  <p style={{width: "211.667px", height: "32px", minWidth: "auto", minHeight: "auto", fontSize: "12px", fontWeight: "500", lineHeight: "16px", textAlign: "left", letterSpacing: "-0.024px", color: "rgb(98, 98, 98)", borderColor: "rgb(98, 98, 98)", outline: "rgb(98, 98, 98) none 0px"}}>
                    Last interaction, # of interactions, strongest connection, etc.
                  </p>
                </div>

                  <div style={{width: "211.667px", height: "16px", minWidth: "auto", minHeight: "auto", marginTop: "4px", marginBottom: "-4px", textAlign: "left"}}>
                    <h3 id="feature-group-heading-2" style={{width: "211.667px", height: "16px", fontSize: "12px", fontWeight: "500", lineHeight: "16px", textAlign: "left", letterSpacing: "-0.024px", color: "rgb(98, 98, 98)", borderColor: "rgb(98, 98, 98)", outline: "rgb(98, 98, 98) none 0px"}}>
                      Messages and sequences
                    </h3>
                  </div>
                </div>
                <div role="cell" aria-hidden="true" style={{display: "grid", width: "243.667px", height: "40px", minWidth: "auto", minHeight: "auto", padding: "12px 16px", alignItems: "center", textAlign: "left", borderLeftWidth: "0.666667px", borderColor: "rgb(217, 217, 217)"}} />
                <div role="cell" aria-hidden="true" style={{display: "grid", width: "243.667px", height: "40px", minWidth: "auto", minHeight: "auto", padding: "12px 16px", alignItems: "center", textAlign: "left", borderLeftWidth: "0.666667px", borderColor: "rgb(217, 217, 217)"}} />
                <div role="cell" aria-hidden="true" style={{display: "grid", width: "243.667px", height: "40px", minWidth: "auto", minHeight: "auto", padding: "12px 16px", alignItems: "center", textAlign: "left", borderLeftWidth: "0.666667px", borderColor: "rgb(217, 217, 217)"}} />
              </div>
              <div role="row" style={{display: "grid", width: "974.667px", height: "42px", gridTemplateColumns: "243.667px 243.667px 243.667px 243.667px", gridTemplateRows: "42px", textAlign: "left"}}>
                <div role="rowheader" style={{display: "grid", width: "243.667px", height: "42px", minWidth: "auto", minHeight: "auto", padding: "12px 16px", alignItems: "center", gridTemplateColumns: "211.667px", gridTemplateRows: "18px", textAlign: "left"}}>
                  <p style={{width: "211.667px", height: "18px", minWidth: "auto", minHeight: "auto", fontWeight: "500", textAlign: "left"}}>

                  </p>
                </div>
                <div role="cell" style={{display: "grid", width: "243.667px", height: "42px", minWidth: "auto", minHeight: "auto", padding: "12px 16px", alignItems: "center", gridTemplateColumns: "211px", gridTemplateRows: "18px", textAlign: "left", borderLeftWidth: "0.666667px", borderColor: "rgb(217, 217, 217)"}}>
                  <p style={{width: "211px", height: "18px", minWidth: "auto", minHeight: "auto", textAlign: "left"}}>
                    1
                    <span style={{display: "inline", width: "auto", height: "auto", textAlign: "left", color: "rgb(98, 98, 98)", borderColor: "rgb(98, 98, 98)", outline: "rgb(98, 98, 98) none 0px"}} />
                  </p>
                </div>
                <div role="cell" style={{display: "grid", width: "243.667px", height: "42px", minWidth: "auto", minHeight: "auto", padding: "12px 16px", alignItems: "center", gridTemplateColumns: "211px", gridTemplateRows: "18px", textAlign: "left", borderLeftWidth: "0.666667px", borderColor: "rgb(217, 217, 217)"}}>

                  </p>
                </div>
                <div role="cell" style={{display: "grid", width: "243.667px", height: "42px", minWidth: "auto", minHeight: "auto", padding: "12px 16px", alignItems: "center", gridTemplateColumns: "211px", gridTemplateRows: "18px", textAlign: "left", borderLeftWidth: "0.666667px", borderColor: "rgb(217, 217, 217)"}}>

                  </p>
                </div>
              </div>
            </div>

                </div>

                    </a>

                  </svg>
                </div>
                <div role="cell" style={{display: "grid", width: "243.667px", height: "42px", minWidth: "auto", minHeight: "auto", padding: "12px 16px", alignItems: "center", gridTemplateColumns: "211px", gridTemplateRows: "18px", textAlign: "left", borderLeftWidth: "0.666667px", borderColor: "rgb(217, 217, 217)"}}>

                    <path d="m429-336 238-237-51-51-187 186-85-84-51 51zm51 240q-79 0-149-30t-122.5-82.5T126-331 96-480q0-80 30-149.5t82.5-122T331-834t149-30q80 0 149.5 30t122 82.5 82.5 122T864-480q0 79-30 149t-82.5 122.5-122 82.5T480-96m0-72q130 0 221-91t91-221-91-221-221-91-221 91-91 221 91 221 221 91m0-312" style={{display: "inline", width: "auto", height: "auto", textAlign: "left", color: "rgb(98, 98, 98)", borderColor: "rgb(98, 98, 98)", outline: "rgb(98, 98, 98) none 0px", fill: "rgb(98, 98, 98)"}} />

                </div>
                <div role="cell" style={{display: "grid", width: "243.667px", height: "42px", minWidth: "auto", minHeight: "auto", padding: "12px 16px", alignItems: "center", gridTemplateColumns: "211px", gridTemplateRows: "18px", textAlign: "left", borderLeftWidth: "0.666667px", borderColor: "rgb(217, 217, 217)"}}>

  );
}
